title: dortmanna neriifolia
intro: Dortmanna neriifolia, also known as Yellow Bird's Eye or Indian Shot, is a tropical plant species native to the Americas, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, colds, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Dortmanna neriifolia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be made by steeping the leaves, bark, or roots in hot water or a solvent, and are often used to treat a range of ailments.
